summary: P1 AAV Dashboard UI Integration & AAV Webhook Events testing completed. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - all AAV components present in escrow create modal. Fixed bug in aav-api-service.js (logger import issue).

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: aav-api-service.js was importing logger incorrectly (const logger = require vs const { logger } = require)
AAV API key is properly hidden in responses (only aav_api_key_configured boolean exposed)
SUPPORTED_EVENTS in webhook-service.js correctly includes all 3 AAV events
buildAAVEventData function properly constructs AAV webhook payloads
Frontend modal correctly shows all AAV fields when Agent Authorization toggle is enabled

test_credentials.note: Tests create unique users via POST /api/v1/auth/signup

seed_data_creation: Tests create and cleanup escrow accounts with AAV settings
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 AAV Dashboard UI Integration & Webhook Events fully tested. Key findings: 1) All new AAV fields work correctly on escrow accounts (aav_api_key, aav_require_certificate). 2) aav_api_key_configured boolean is returned instead of actual key. 3) SUPPORTED_EVENTS includes aav.verification_passed, aav.verification_denied, aav.verification_failed. 4) AAV webhooks are queued when spend is made with AAV API key configured. 5) Frontend modal shows all AAV fields (API Key input, Require Certificate toggle, Log Only/Verify enforcement mode buttons) when Agent Authorization is enabled.
mocked_api_note: AAV /verify endpoint calls are MOCKED - requires real aav_live_sk_... key from agentictrust.app. The system falls back to local agent_id/grant_id matching when AAV API call fails.

bug_fixed.fix: Changed 'const logger = require('../lib/logger')' to 'const { logger } = require('../lib/logger')'
